/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ecl_test_constants.dir/constants.cpp.o -o ecl_test_constants  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ri-one/ri_one_master_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib ../../gtest/libgtest_main.a ../../gtest/libgtest.a /home/ri-one/ri_one_master_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1 -pthread
